name: Auxiliary validation rule for Network & Communication Security #9
description: Verify configuration matches parameters for UTSCF-NCS-09 in Network & Communication Security category.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper auxiliary validation rule for network & communication security #9 settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
